scenario_label: CYP2C19 Rapid Metabolizer — No Actionable Flag (True Surgical Complication Demo)

CYP2C19.interpretation: Increased CYP2C19 activity. No actionable interaction with current post-op medications (no clopidogrel prescribed).

demo_note: This patient's elevated pain + fever + spreading redness should be classified as a true surgical site infection — not a PGx issue. Used to demonstrate that Homeward correctly distinguishes infection from medication inefficacy.
